subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Abhá Beauty! Give thanks unto God that through the bounty of guidance thy countenance shineth even as the radiant moon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده باوفای جمال ابهی شکر کن خدا را که بفیض هدی رخی چون مه تابان روشن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
